**Note:** The issue tracker is for code defects. EnvyControl-go strictly prepares hardware states; UI configurations are your responsibility.

**1. Have you read the "Do-It-Yourself" section in the README?**
> (Yes/No)

**2. What are you trying to achieve?**
> (e.g., Fixing screen tearing on X11, getting external monitor output on Wayland)

**3. What specific files have you modified manually?**
> (Provide contents of /etc/X11/xorg.conf, Xsetup scripts, etc.)

**4. System specifics:**
> OS:
> Display Server (X11/Wayland):
> Window Manager / DM:
